final_prompt.prompt:
Create a domestic China fundraising roadshow PPT cover for GPT-5.5 launch, featuring Sam Altman as keynote speaker, designed for Chinese VC/GP audience.

Style/medium: professional Chinese tech roadshow PPT cover, clean corporate aesthetic with the understated authority of Linear's design language
Composition: centered title hierarchy with speaker portrait placement, generous top margin for breathing room
Subject: GPT-5.5 product launch announcement, speaker Sam Altman
Scene/backdrop: minimal gradient or subtle tech-pattern background, no literal AI imagery
Lighting/mood: crisp morning clarity, the quiet confidence of institutional-grade presentation
Color palette: neutral deep blue or slate with one accent color for emphasis, the chromatic restraint of serious capital
Materials/textures: matte digital surface, no glossy effects
Text (verbatim): GPT-5.5发布, 演讲人: Sam Altman (奥特曼)
Constraints: must read as professional Chinese VC roadshow material, all text bilingual-ready, speaker name preserved exactly as "奥特曼"
Avoid: Western startup cliché (rocket ships, lightbulbs), overly decorative gradients, playful illustration, generic stock-photo tech aesthetic
